default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Configure access and tools for Bruno, and set up lead qualification process.](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bruno gained access to shared passwords via 1Password and team calls in Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Set up lead qualification form in Calendly to route prospects based on budget/urgency](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Configured Bruno's availability in Calendly for intro calls](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Discussed approach for handling initial prospect conversations](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

## Topics

### Tool Access Setup

  - [Configured 1Password access for Bruno to shared passwords and logins](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Set up Fathom access for Bruno to view team call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Troubleshooted issues with Google account access](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### Lead Qualification Process

  - [Created Calendly form with qualifying questions on budget and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Set up routing logic:](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - \<$9k budget & not urgent → Bruno/Jimmy intro call
      - [All other cases → Marcel for further qualification](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Discussed keeping initial calls to 15 minutes for quick qualification](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### Prospect Conversation Approach

  - [Focus on understanding prospect's situation before pitching](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Emphasize GrowthX's unique offering vs traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Be transparent about pricing/packages starting at $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Option to bring in other team members if prospect seems qualified](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### Proposal Follow-ups

  - [Bruno to draft proposals for Superhuman and Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Marcel to review and send out tonight](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Discussed upcoming team meeting in Vegas](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=2568.0)
  - [Noted Smith AI follow-up needed - create Notion space to share](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to configure Calendly availability for intro calls](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Bruno to draft proposals for Superhuman and Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Marcel to review and send out proposals](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Create Notion space for Smith AI and share with Aaron/Matt](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [Bruno to review Fathom call recordings to get up to speed](https://fathom.video/share/hytei_7VwzT5qNFnkeBtiyyEaJJnWbrk?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

action_items.description: Install One Password app on computer + set up browser extension
Log into Fathom w/ team account, share existing calls w/ team
Create Smith AI space in Notion, share doc w/ Aaron + Matt
Implement + test new intro call routing form
Draft proposals for Superhuman + Abnormal Security
